name: Can I switch doctors for my occupational disease treatment in Boise?

mainEntity.name: Can I switch doctors for my occupational disease treatment in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get written approval after initial provider.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly after initial authorized care, but get written approval to avoid denials.[1] Idaho similar.[2] Key factors: Carrier directs first; prove need for specialist; no self-pay coverage.[1] Request in writing early. Legal advice prevents bill disputes.

description: Get written approval after initial provider.[1]
